key.name: portals-restore-token
key.description: Token used to restore remote desktop sessions without requiring user re-authorization.

key.name: welcome-screen-shown
key.description: Whether the welcome screen has been shown to the user at least once.

key.name: shortcut-configured
key.description: Whether the global shortcut has been successfully configured (at least one shortcut read from the portal).

key.name: background-recording
key.description: When enabled, the main window stays hidden during recordings. The pipeline runs entirely in the background, and the window remains accessible from the dock.

key.name: default-language
key.description: ISO 639-1 code for the default language used for speech recognition and text processing.

key.name: secondary-language
key.description: ISO 639-1 code for the secondary language. Use left Shift for primary and right Shift for secondary language.

key.name: append-space
key.description: When enabled, a space character is appended after each transcription output.

key.name: hide-instead-of-minimize
key.description: When enabled, the main window is hidden instead of minimized when not in use. Useful for multi-workspace setups.

key.name: stay-hidden-on-activation
key.description: When enabled, the app starts without showing the main window. The global shortcut still works normally.

key.name: credentials
key.description: JSON-serialized list of credentials for various services.

key.name: voice-model-providers
key.description: JSON-serialized list of ASR provider configurations for speech recognition.

key.name: selected-voice-model-provider-id
key.description: The ID of the currently selected voice model provider for speech recognition.

key.name: text-processing-enabled
key.description: Enable LLM-based text processing to polish transcriptions.

key.name: text-model-providers
key.description: JSON-serialized list of LLM provider configurations.

key.name: selected-text-model-provider-id
key.description: The ID of the currently selected text model provider for text processing.

key.name: custom-context
key.description: Optionally share details like job, location, or writing style to help improve transcriptions.

key.name: custom-vocabulary
key.description: Optionally add words, names, technical terms, or acronyms the model should recognize.

key.name: sanitize-special-chars
key.description: When enabled, accented and special characters are replaced with their ASCII equivalents before typing. Enable this if your desktop portal does not correctly handle Unicode keysyms.

key.name: post-hide-delay-ms
key.description: Time in milliseconds to wait after hiding the main window before issuing typing commands, to give the desktop environment time to physically hide the window.

key.name: typing-delay-ms
key.description: Delay in milliseconds between each virtual keyboard keystroke. Set to 0 to disable. Increase this if characters are dropped or appear out of order or like a slower typing effect.

key.name: vad-endpointing
key.description: Use Silero VAD to end the utterance automatically.

key.name: vad-min-silence-ms
key.summary: Silence duration before VAD ends an utterance (ms)
key.description: Lower values feel more responsive but cut speech sooner.

key.name: compute-provider
key.description: "CPU" or "CUDA" — name of the ComputeProvider enum value. GPU requires a Sherpa build with -DSHERPA_ONNX_ENABLE_GPU=ON.
